architect_design.notes: Design v1: Validates and supplements the detailed task spec. Key decisions: (1) system-wide install with --break-system-packages (consistency with existing torch/snntorch/scipy stack, no venv). (2) VectorBT PRO graceful fallback to OSS vectorbt if no license. (3) NautilusTrader: pip first, Rust toolchain build if no ARM64 wheel. 4 deliverables (~130L): requirements-backtest.txt, directory structure, smoke tests, setup script. ARM64 risk assessment for all 8 packages. 4 open questions for critic (VectorBT license, system vs venv, NautilusTrader ARM64, separate requirements file).
